headline: LLY Expands Oncology Pipeline With $2.3B Ajax Therapeutics Acquisition
summary: Lilly is set to acquire Ajax Therapeutics for up to $2.3B, gaining a novel JAK2 inhibitor as it ramps up oncology bets and targets unmet needs in MPN treatment.

raw.headline: LLY Expands Oncology Pipeline With $2.3B Ajax Therapeutics Acquisition
